steps.title: Check the slope direction
steps.content: The line of best fit rises from left to right, so its slope must be positive. This keeps the equations with a positive coefficient of $x$.

steps.title: Check the intercept
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis at a positive value. That means the constant term should also be positive.

steps.title: Match both signs
steps.content: The only equation with positive slope and positive $y$-intercept is $y=0.8+1.7x$. The answer is A.
